= Scotch Gambit Accepted =

=== 6...d5! ===
d5! simultaneously defends the e4-knight and attacks the c4-bishop. However, instead of retreating, White may try the move [[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. Nf3/2...Nc6/3. Bc4/3...Nf6/4. d4/4...exd4/5. O-O/5...Nxe4/6. Re1/6...d5/7. Bxd5|Bxd5!]] with hopes of Qxd5 Nc3! attacking the pinned knight on e4 and the queen, and cannot be captured as dxc3?? Qxd5! wins the queen.

A rarer followup is Nc3!! with the intention of dxc3 Bxd5! winning the knight on e4.
